products.name: Silver Seas Syrup Orange 125 ml
products.description: Domestic product manufactured by El-Obour Modern Pharmaceutical Industries. Composition: Cod liver oil 1500 mg per 5 ml. Indication: Boosting immunity, memory and academic achievement and very helpful for healthy cardiovascular, neuropsychiatry and reproduction systems. Why Silver Seas Syrup? Contains cod liver oil which is Omega 3 source and fortified by extra vitamin A and vitamin D3 with orange flavor. Dose: One teaspoonful per day. Package: bottle of 125 ml.

products.name: s.p mix vanilla food supplement 200 Gram
products.description: Domestic product manufactured by Nutrixia for nutritional industries. Composition: 80% sweet potato powder and 20% gluten free wheat germ extract. Indication: Source of fibers, minerals and vitamins and used for malnourished patients. Why S.P Mix? Contains sweet potato and wheat germ extract which is sugar and gluten free and suitable for children from 6 months. Rich in protein, vitamins and minerals like iron, zinc and magnesium. Contains beta-carotene which is precursor of vitamin A, omega 3, vitamin E and vitamins B1, B2, B6 and B12. Dose: For adults and kids add 3 tablespoons to 50–75 ml of water, milk or juice. Between meals for kids add 1 tablespoon to 100 ml of water, milk or juice. Between meals for adults add 2 tablespoons to 200 ml of water, milk or juice. Can be added to yogurt, ice cream or during preparing bread or cake. Package: box of 2 sachets each sachet contains 100 gm with chocolate, strawberry, vanilla flavors and flavorless.

products.name: Ronma Vanilla 10 sachets
products.description: Domestic product manufactured by Marvel Pharma Group – industrial zone – Badr city for RK Pharma. Composition: Lactoferrin, zinc, colostrum, iron, calcium and vitamin B12. Indication: Ronma is used for treatment of anemia and to increase the body immunity due to the presence of lactoferrin and zinc. It is also fortified with iron, calcium, colostrum and vitamin B12. Dose: One sachet per day or according to doctor advice. Package: box contains 10 sachets of 10 gm with vanilla flavor.

products.name: Prog Chocolate 350 gm
products.description: Domestic product manufactured by Marvel Pharma Group for RK Pharma. Composition: Spread chocolate fortified with fish oil powder, iron, zinc, biotin, vitamin A, vitamin E, vitamin B1, vitamin B2, vitamin B3, vitamin B5, vitamin B6, vitamin B9, vitamin B12, vitamin C, cocoa butter, full cream milk powder, cocoa powder, whey milk powder concentration 70%, coconut oil, vanillin flavour, pectin, citric acid monohydrate, soya lecithin and polydextrose. Indication: Iron deficiency anemia, celiac disease, malnutrition, retarded physical and mental growth. Usage: For children above 4 years. Dose: 1–2 teaspoonful (5–10 gm) per day. Package: plastic jar contain 350 gm.

products.name: Lumicasage Cream 60 gm
products.description: Domestic product manufactured by Egyptian Co. for cosmetics. Composition: Camphor, menthol, peppermint oil and clove oil. Indication: Relief of pain and aches of muscles and joints. Why Lumicasage Cream? Relieves pain of sprain, strain and osteoarthritis due to muscle relaxant effect and increases blood flow in the affected area. Dose: Twice per day or according to doctor advice. Package: tube of 60 gm.

products.name: Danica Massage Gel 100 ml
products.description: Danica is a topically applied fast and long-lasting relieving gel for muscle, neck and back pain, inflammation, myositis, fibromyalgia, sciatica and sprains. The active-enhanced formula with camphor oil, eucalyptus oil, panthenol and menthol penetrates quickly, targeting the area of pain. Its convenient roll-on applicator makes it easy to use anywhere and on the go. How to use: Clean and dry the affected area. Shake the package well before use. Gently massage Danica onto the painful area using circular motions. Repeat as needed throughout the day. Package: 100 ml plastic roll, easy to use.

products.name: Caroca Calcium Tablets Chocolate Tablets pack
products.description: Chocolate-flavoured calcium supplement fortified with lactoferrin, vitamin E, and folic acid

Used for sore throat due to the presence of eucalyptus which has soothing and antiseptic effects. Dose: When needed. Package: boxes of 12 or 24 lozenges with orange, menthol, lemon & honey and cherry flavors.

products.name: Brodrink Detox Tea
products.description: Domestic product manufactured by Egyptian Co. for cosmetics. Composition: Contains urea 5%, propolis, glycerin and vitamin C. Indication: For eczema, dermatitis, ichthyosis, psoriasis, post laser sessions and post peeling and treatment for acute sunburns. Why Brother Care Cream? Contains optimum concentration of urea which moisturizes the skin without irritation, antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects due to propolis. Acts as skin emollient for dry cracked skin, sunburns and post laser sessions. Vitamin C acts as powerful antioxidant and helps skin recovery. Dose: Apply suitable amount on desired area twice daily. Package: tube of 100 gm.

products.name: Broc Sachet Orange 10 sachets
products.description: Domestic product manufactured by Nutrixia for nutritional industries for RK Pharma. Composition: Collagen peptide, glucosamine sulfate, chondroitin and vitamin C. Indication: Collagen source for osteoarthritis pain and aging skin. Why Broc? Contains 10 gm of collagen peptide which is responsible for cartilage formation and relief of joint pain and improves muscle strength and also for aging skin and decreasing wrinkles. Dose: For osteoarthritis one sachet per day for 3–5 months. For aging skin one sachet per day for 2–3 months. Package: box of 10 sachets of 10 gm with orange flavor.
